cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Detachment to Forced Engagement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl evolves from emotional passivity to enforced openness through the 'Yes' experiment, only to face its consequences when authenticity collapses in personal relationships and he realizes the philosophy was manipulated.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: disillusioned and desperate after realizing his compliance was exploited
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to reclaim agency after being misled

cross_scene_arcs.title: Professional Stagnation to Rise and Fall
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl moves from a stagnant teller role to a promoted loan specialist and rising executive talent through initiative and risk-taking, but his career collapses after he sabotages a merger and resigns in disgrace.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: acknowledges class/status gap in workplace hierarchy
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: resigns from job, merger fails due to his actions
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Carl's reasons for sabotaging the merger are not fully explained, and his future plans are unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Transformation Through Microloan Work
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl's unauthorized loan to Marge initiates a shift toward meaningful financial outreach, leading to professional recognition and eventually direct international engagement with borrowers like Omar in Nigeria.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Fractured Relationships and Failed Intimacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl repeatedly struggles to maintain authentic connections, losing Kath due to emotional detachment, Renee due to performative compliance, and only later rebuilding trust through genuine reparation with Omar.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Carl's inability to express genuine preferences

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mentorship and Disillusionment with Sanji
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl forms a transformative but ultimately destructive bond with Sanji, embracing his 'say yes' philosophy before discovering Sanji's exploitation and rejecting the manipulation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: develops moment of intimacy with Sanji
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: breaks trust with Sanji, publicly confronts him as a fraud
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to reclaim agency after being misled

cross_scene_arcs.title: Intervention and Reconnection with Carl
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peter evolves from concerned friend to active intervener, then accountability partner, in Carl's life, navigating moments of conflict, reconciliation, and growing concern, ultimately becoming a trusted figure as Carl prepares to leave.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peter confronts Carl about his isolation and failed to attend important events.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Peter is entrusted with Carl's keys and responsibility for his belongings as Carl departs.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Peter's inconsistent emotional support and tendency to dismiss Carl's vulnerability may undermine their connection despite deepening trust.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Carl's 'Yes' Rule and Peter's Role
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peter becomes Carl's 'Yesponsor,' agreeing to hold him accountable for saying yes to everything, but grows increasingly uneasy as Carl's choices escalate, revealing Peter's passive complicity despite concern.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peter agrees to be Carl's accountability partner in his 'yes' experiment.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Peter observes Carl's extreme adherence to the rule but does not intervene, remaining involved without active guidance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Peter will challenge Carl's harmful decisions or continue enabling the behavior through inaction.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Peter's Emotional Vulnerability Around Marriage
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Peter gradually reveals anxiety about his readiness for marriage, contrasting his earlier assertiveness with growing self-doubt, while prioritizing wedding logistics over emotional engagement with others.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Peter admits he is terrified of being a bad husband due to his inability to engage with wedding details.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Peter is emotionally distracted, wearing a crown from Carl's celebration while drunk, still grappling with unresolved fears.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Peter has not taken concrete steps to address his emotional inadequacy in the relationship.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mutual Support and Public Recognition
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl publicly celebrates Peter and Lucy's engagement in a grand gesture, reinforcing their bond, and culminates in a moment of deep trust as he entrusts Peter with his possessions before leaving.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Carl organizes an impromptu celebration at Rudy's to honor Peter and Lucy's engagement.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Carl gives Peter his keys, symbolizing trust and closure in their friendship.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The future of their friendship remains uncertain as Carl departs without revealing his destination.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Persistence to Reciprocity with Carl
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Renee transitions from repeated outreach to forming a collaborative, creative rapport with Carl, beginning with his first acknowledgment and culminating in shared artistic activities and mutual inclusion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Renee is ignored by Carl despite persistent flyer distribution.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Renee and Carl participate in reciprocal creative exchange, including songwriting and photography.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The depth and longevity of their connection beyond shared artistic moments remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Development and Emotional Disillusionment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Renee and Carl enter a romantic relationship marked by physical intimacy and growing emotional expectations, but it deteriorates as Renee perceives Carl's inattentiveness and inauthenticity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Renee initiates a date with Carl, redefining him as a shy romantic interest.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Renee withdraws emotionally, rejecting Carl due to his lack of genuine emotional expression.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Carl can develop authentic emotional presence to sustain a real relationship.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Creative Leadership and Artistic Community Building
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Renee evolves from a street promoter to a recognized artistic leader, guiding group activities and exhibiting work, while integrating Carl into her creative world.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Renee distributes flyers as a lone promoter seeking audience engagement.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Renee leads a photography group and exhibits in a gallery, recognized as a creative authority.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Balancing personal vulnerability with her role as a public artist.

cross_scene_arcs.title: World Journey and Personal Autonomy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Renee commits to a world trip, asserting her independence, and later re-encounters Carl in Bangkok, suggesting a tension between personal freedom and relational possibility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Renee announces her plan to travel the world, expressing both excitement and fear.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Renee is in Bangkok, open to reconciliation but questioning Carl's motives and presence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Renee will prioritize her journey or recommit to a relationship with Carl.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict Over Authenticity and Relational Agency
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Renee repeatedly asserts her needs and boundaries in response to Carl's people-pleasing and inattentive behavior, culminating in emotional withdrawal and a cautious reconsideration of their connection.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Renee challenges Carl's performative choices and seeks authentic engagement.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Renee ends the relationship due to Carl's inauthenticity but remains open to change upon his reappearance in Bangkok.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Carl can sustain genuine self-expression and meet Renee's emotional needs.
